mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.type, CASE WHEN c.type = 'GAME' THEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game g WHERE g.category_id = c.id) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM menu m WHERE m.category_id = c.id AND m.is_deleted = false) END AS productCount FROM category c ORDER BY c.type, c.id

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.type, COUNT(m.id) AS productCount FROM category c LEFT JOIN menu m ON m.category_id = c.id AND m.is_deleted = false WHERE c.type = #{type} GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.type ORDER BY c.id
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.type, COUNT(m.id) AS productCount FROM category c LEFT JOIN menu m ON m.category_id = c.id AND m.is_deleted = false WHERE c.id = #{id} GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.type
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM menu WHERE category_id = #{id} AND is_deleted = false
